name: io.github.boxlab-ltd/yandex-metrica-mcp
description: Query Yandex Metrica web analytics — reports, trends, comparisons and metadata — through an AI agent.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Yandex Metrica OAuth token (metrika:read). Optional if you run the `auth` login.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_COUNTER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default counter id, so tools may omit counterId.
